name: anti-kuddus-protocol
description: Anti-Kuddus Protocol — full-stack monorepo (React frontend + Node/SQLite backend).

scripts.dev: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c blue,magenta -k "npm --prefix backend run dev" "npm --prefix frontend run dev"
scripts.start: npm run build && npm --prefix backend start
scripts.install:all: npm --prefix backend install && npm --prefix frontend install
scripts.db:reset: npm --prefix backend run db:setup && npm --prefix backend run db:seed
scripts.setup: npm run install:all && npm run db:reset
